title: stellaris verna
intro: Stellaris verna, also known as star anise or Illicium verum, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to southern China and Vietnam. The plant's seeds contain a compound called shikimic acid, which is used in the production of the antiviral medication oseltamivir, commonly used to treat influenza. The medicinal properties of stellaris verna include its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of stellaris verna include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being, and to support the immune system.
